canonicality.name: ObserverProjectionCanonicality
canonicality.definition: why admissible universe-structure appears as a stable interpretable world to finite intelligent observers
canonicality.formal: Proj_obs^canon = Select_adm o Compress_struct o Reconstruct_local

verdict.core_answer: The world appears intelligible because observer-side projection is not arbitrary: it preferentially selects admissible, compressible, semantically stable structure.
